'''鈭歱-b-zh-ch''' ('''kapabzhechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jeopard|jeopard]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-b-zh-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jeopard|jeopard]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-b-zh-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kapabzhechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipabzhechoko|thipabzhechoko]] || [[word:jipabzhechoko|jipabzhechoko]] || [[word:shipabzhechoko|shipabzhechoko]] || [[word:kipabzhechoko|kipabzhechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupabzhechoko|thuthupabzhechoko]] || [[word:jujupabzhechoko|jujupabzhechoko]] || [[word:shushupabzhechoko|shushupabzhechoko]] || [[word:kukupabzhechoko|kukupabzhechoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
